verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are days this life can get so common, Such valley, a monotony; Help me, Lord, to renew the quest I'm walkin', Being all I can be, every minute for Thee.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Make it count, make it matter, Live your life to the most, A cloud of witness is watching With the Heavenly Host, One life to serve Him, to give an account; Savor the moment, make it count.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Listen closely to the saints of old, They're rejoicing for us all; For they know what's awaiting us in Beulah, So I'll keep giving my voice, For the sake of the cause.
